01 — About
Turning data chaos
into clarity

I'm a Data Engineer who got hooked on data after seeing how a single well-built pipeline could replace weeks of manual work overnight. That drive has shaped three years of building end-to-end data systems — optimizing SQL-heavy ETL workflows and delivering BI solutions that actually get used. My background spans fintech (NayaPay), agri-tech (PureHarvest), telecom (Telenor Pakistan), and AI-tooling (Turing).

I specialize in bridging the gap between raw, messy data and the decision-ready dashboards and models that business teams depend on. Whether that means designing a Vertica-based ETL for 100M+ row datasets, automating remittance reporting that once took hours, or clustering cell sites with geospatial analysis — I build things that last.

My stack is SQL-first (PostgreSQL, Vertica, Oracle, MongoDB), Python-powered (Pandas, automation, ML), and cloud-enabled (AWS Redshift, EMR, S3). I present findings through Power BI and Plotly, and orchestrate workflows with tools like Airflow and dbt.

Educated at IBA Karachi — one of Pakistan's premier business and computer science institutions — with a B.S. in Computer Science focused on databases, cloud computing, and data mining.

Reduction in manual remittance reporting effort at NayaPay via end-to-end Python + SQL automation

03 — Experience
Where I've
built things
Oct 2025 – Present
Turing
Remote
Text-to-SQL Developer
  • Delivered 175+ optimized SQL queries with 92% accuracy, directly supporting Databricks analytics workflows and accelerating insights for downstream teams.
  • Reviewed and refined team members' SQL outputs to enforce Text-to-SQL standards, raising overall query quality and strengthening pipeline reliability.
  • Applied deep knowledge of window functions, CTEs, and complex joins to produce queries that are both correct and performant at scale.
May 2025 – Present
Telenor Pakistan
Islamabad, PK
Asst. Manager — Data Engineering & Analytics (B2B)
  • Led end-to-end development of a telecom-based analytics dataset for Easypaisa, engineering 60+ behavioral variables from large-scale telco data to support financial modeling and customer insights — part of a PKR 140M data analytics initiative.
  • Lead development and maintenance of Bizmine, Telenor's enterprise analytics portal, ensuring high availability and data accuracy for enterprise clients.
  • Designed and optimized ETL pipelines for high-volume data ingestion from Vertica and external APIs, improving throughput and data freshness.
  • Applied geospatial clustering of cell sites to optimize network planning, supporting strategic resource allocation decisions at scale.
  • Collaborated cross-functionally with product, network, and business teams to translate complex data requirements into reliable data models.
Jul 2024 – Apr 2025
PureHarvest
Dubai, UAE (Remote)
Data Analyst
  • Designed and deployed Power BI & Superset dashboards with real-time updates, cutting reporting time by 60% and enabling self-service analytics for operations teams.
  • Migrated legacy Excel workflows to AWS Redshift, optimizing SQL queries and ETL pipelines to improve overall data efficiency by 70%.
  • Built Python automation scripts for ETL processing, reducing manual data work by 80% while improving data accuracy and consistency across systems.
  • Delivered stakeholder-facing BI reports that directly informed procurement, planting, and logistics decisions.
Feb 2023 – Aug 2024
NayaPay
Karachi, PK
Data Associate — AI & Data Analytics
  • Integrated MongoDB, Oracle DB, and SSMS into unified analytics workflows using Python and SQL, reducing manual dispute resolution work by 80%.
  • Built dynamic, real-time Power BI & Plotly dashboards executing DAX on 100M+ row datasets to support fintech KPIs and executive decision-making.
  • Automated remittance reporting end-to-end, achieving a 95% reduction in manual effort and improving data integrity across regulatory pipelines.
  • Optimized State Bank of Pakistan reporting via Python and Oracle DB, bringing report generation time down to 1 minute 18 seconds.
  • Engineered a 700-condition SQL script for precision customer address conversion, enhancing KYC data accuracy and compliance.
  • Integrated Oracle DB into Power BI for real-time merchant category dashboards, enabling continuous operational monitoring.
04 — Case Studies
Data Engineering
Projects
PROJECT 01
Automated Remittance Reporting Pipeline — NayaPay
Remittance reports were manually compiled from Oracle and MongoDB, taking hours per cycle with high error rates and compliance risk.
SourceOracle DB, MongoDB, SSMS
ApproachPython automation + SQL transformations → Power BI
Scale100M+ transaction rows processed
Python Oracle DB SQL Power BI MongoDB
✦ 95% manual effort eliminated · 1m 18s report runtime
⚡ challenge solved: Reconciling 3 disconnected databases (Oracle, MongoDB, SSMS) into a single consistent reporting model without data loss or duplication
PROJECT 02
Excel-to-Redshift Data Migration & BI Modernization — PureHarvest
Operations relied on disconnected Excel sheets for reporting. Data was stale, manually maintained, and not scalable for a growing agri-tech operation.
SourceExcel / CSV files, ERP exports
ApproachPython ETL → AWS Redshift → Power BI + Superset
OutcomeReal-time dashboards replacing static reports
AWS Redshift Python Power BI Superset SQL
✦ 60% faster reporting · 70% efficiency improvement
⚡ challenge solved: Migrating years of inconsistent Excel data with no schema discipline into a typed, queryable Redshift warehouse without breaking existing reporting
PROJECT 03
Bizmine ETL Pipeline Optimization — Telenor Pakistan
Telenor's enterprise analytics portal (Bizmine) required reliable, high-throughput pipelines to serve B2B clients with fresh data from diverse Vertica and API sources.
SourceVertica, REST APIs, internal data marts
ApproachETL redesign with query optimization + geospatial enrichment
ScaleTelecom-grade enterprise data volumes
Vertica SQL Python Geospatial ETL REST APIs
✦ High availability for enterprise analytics portal
⚡ challenge solved: Designing ETL pipelines resilient enough to handle schema drift and API inconsistencies from diverse Vertica and external sources without pipeline failure
PROJECT 04
KYC Address Normalization Engine — NayaPay
Customer address data was inconsistent across 100M+ records, causing KYC verification failures and compliance bottlenecks across the fintech platform.
SourceCustomer registration database (Oracle/SSMS)
Approach700-condition SQL transformation script for address standardization
ImpactCompliance & KYC accuracy at scale
SQL Oracle DB Python Data Quality
✦ Enhanced KYC accuracy · Regulatory compliance
⚡ challenge solved: Writing a 700-condition SQL transformation that handles regional address format variations across Pakistan — without false-positive standardizations
PROJECT 05
Cell Site Geospatial Clustering — Telenor Pakistan
Network planning teams lacked a data-driven view of cell site performance by geography, making resource allocation and infrastructure investment decisions ad hoc.
SourceCell site network data + geospatial coordinates
ApproachClustering algorithms + geospatial visualization
ImpactStrategic network planning decisions
Python Scikit-learn GeoPandas Vertica Plotly
✦ Optimized network resource allocation
⚡ challenge solved: Mapping cell site clusters meaningfully when GPS coordinates alone don't reflect actual coverage overlap or traffic load distribution
PROJECT 06
Diabetes Prediction ML Pipeline
Built an end-to-end CRISP-DM machine learning pipeline to predict diabetes onset from health data, with results deployed directly to a Power BI dashboard for clinical review.
SourcePIMA Diabetes Dataset
ApproachCRISP-DM: EDA → Feature Engineering → SVM → Power BI
Accuracy82% SVM model accuracy
Python Scikit-learn Pandas Power BI SVM
✦ 82% accuracy · End-to-end ML-to-BI pipeline
⚡ challenge solved: Deploying SVM predictions back into Power BI in a way that is interpretable to non-technical clinical stakeholders — bridging ML output and BI presentation
PROJECT 08 CLIENT PROJECT DATABRICKS
e
Telenor Pakistan × Easypaisa
Telco-to-Fintech Behavioral Dataset — Easypaisa × Telenor (PKR 140M Initiative)
Easypaisa required a rich behavioral dataset derived from Telenor's large-scale telecom data to power financial scoring models and customer segmentation. Raw telco data — call records, recharge patterns, network usage — needed to be translated into 60+ meaningful financial-behavior signals for downstream credit and product teams.
SourceTelenor large-scale telco data (CDRs, recharges, network events, subscriber metadata)
ArchitectureVertica data warehouse → Python feature engineering → structured analytics dataset
Scope60+ engineered behavioral variables · PKR 140M data analytics initiative
ImpactFinancial modeling & customer insights for one of Pakistan's largest fintech platforms
Vertica SQL Python Feature Engineering Telco CDR Data Financial Modeling ETL
✦ 60+ behavioral variables · PKR 140M initiative · Fintech × Telecom data product
⚡ challenge solved: Defining financially-meaningful behavioral signals from raw CDR and recharge telco data — variables that actually predict fintech product adoption, not just usage frequency

DATABRICKS CLIENT PROJECT ✓ DELIVERED
Client: Transportation Operator · Role: Data Platform Engineer
Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines — Transportation Domain
Designed and deployed Lakeflow declarative pipelines for a transportation client's real-time data infrastructure — contrasting Declarative vs Imperative patterns, handling incremental loads, and enforcing fine-grained S3 access management across Bronze/Silver/Gold layers.

Manual orchestration · Full reload · Brittle DAGs
After (Lakeflow)

06b — Dashboard Gallery
Business Insights 360
Power BI Dashboard

A full multi-page Business Insights 360 Power BI dashboard covering Finance, Sales, Marketing, Supply Chain, and Executive views — built with advanced DAX, cross-filtering, YoY comparisons, and drill-through navigation across $32M+ in revenue data.

Power BI Advanced DAX 6 Dashboard Views YoY Analysis Cross-filtering Drill-through Navigation
BUSINESS INSIGHTS 360 — EXECUTIVE VIEW
Executive Overview — KPI Summary
Top-level KPI cards showing $32.06M Net Sales, 41.26% GM%, and 0.02 Net Profit% with YoY comparisons. Includes Key Insights by Subzone table, Net Sales Performance trend, and Top/Bottom Products & Customers matrix — all dynamically filtered by region, customer, segment, category, year, and quarter.
Sales View — Product & Region Performance
Drill-down product performance table (Accessories · Networking · Notebook · Peripherals · Storage) with NS$, GM$, GM%, Net Profit$ and %. Features a Performance Matrix scatter chart for division comparison and a Unit Economics waterfall showing COGS vs. Gross Margin vs. Operating Expense breakdown.
Supply Chain View — Forecast Accuracy & Risk
85.92% Forecast Accuracy with Net Error 214.2K and ABS Error 464.7K. Customer-level risk table shows Out of Stock / Excess Inventory flags per account (BestBuy, Costco, Fnac-Darty, etc.). Forecast Accuracy trend line vs. prior year, and product-segment accuracy breakdown — critical for supply chain planning decisions.
Finance View — Full P&L Statement
Complete Profit & Loss statement with 2019 actuals vs. LY (Last Year), YOY change, and YOY% — covering Gross Sales → Net Invoice Sales → Post-Invoice Deductions → Net Sales → COGS → Gross Margin → Operating Expense → Net Profit. Dynamically sliceable by region, customer, segment, year, and quarter.
Dashboard Home — Business Insights 360
Navigation home page for the full Business Insights 360 multi-page report — with icon-based navigation to Finance View, Sales View, Marketing View, Supply Chain View, and Executive View. Designed for non-technical executives to self-navigate across all business dimensions.
10 — Bios

professional copy
LinkedIn Headline
Data Engineer | ETL Pipelines · AWS Redshift · Power BI · Python Automation | Fintech & Telecom | IBA Karachi
GitHub Bio
Data Engineer building scalable pipelines & BI solutions. Python · SQL · AWS · Power BI · dbt. Currently @ Telenor Pakistan. Prev: NayaPay · PureHarvest · Turing.
LinkedIn Summary
Data engineer with 3+ years of experience designing and delivering production-grade data pipelines, BI dashboards, and automation frameworks across fintech, telecom, and agri-tech.

I thrive at the intersection of engineering reliability and analytical impact — whether that's building a 95%-automated remittance pipeline at NayaPay, migrating legacy Excel workflows to AWS Redshift at PureHarvest, or optimizing high-volume ETL ingestion for Telenor Pakistan's Bizmine enterprise portal.

Core stack: Python · SQL (Vertica, PostgreSQL, Oracle) · AWS (Redshift, S3, EMR) · Power BI · dbt · Airflow · Spark.

I'm actively seeking Data Engineer, Analytics Engineer, and Data Platform roles where I can build systems that scale.
